title: aspidium dahlii
intro: Aspidium dahlii, also known as the Indian maidenhair fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aspidium dahlii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and treat digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
